title: “The Vaettir have…
text: “The Vaettir have a saying that is ripe with wisdom : The gods judged it better to bring good out of evil than to suffer no evil to exist. They will not willingly take a life for fear of destroying that potential inside us. We all have tendencies toward evil, some more than others. Each of us must constantly root away those evil tendencies lest they prevail into our character. We each carry within us the bud of true goodness as well as evil. Which we nourish determines our destiny.” —Possidius Adeodat, Archivist of Kenatos
